title: Accounts Executive
description:
ACCOUNTS EXECUTIVE


Responsibilities

· You would be involved in the preparation of full sets of accounts for clients using accounting software, assist in the preparation of information for GST submissions, tax computations as well as the preparation of schedules and reports for both management and for the preparation of the client’s annual financial report and to assist in other special assignments.

· Develop and maintain long-term client relationship.


Requirements

· Candidates must be suitably qualified with at least Diploma/Advanced Diplomas/ Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance or other professional qualifications

· At least 1 to 2 years of related working experience

· Excellent analytical, verbal and written communication skills both English and Mandarin (in order to liaise with Mandarin speaking associates)

· Familiar with accounting software (SAGE Accpac , Quickbooks , MYOB)


Why Join Us

The Firm recognizes and acknowledges that the quality of our people are the key drivers to the Firm success and hence, the Firm is constantly on the look-out for dedicated and committed professionals to grow with the Firm.

In attracting, retaining and motivating our people the Firm endeavor in providing a continuous learning environment in equipping our people with the necessary skills that help the Firm in fully developing our people potentials and professional growth.


If you have what it takes:-

Please email/send your comprehensive resume, including a recent photograph and to include the following details:-

1. Reasons for leaving current employment

2. Availability / Notice period required

3. Last drawn/ current and expected salary

4. References (if any)


The Recruitment Partner

ACFOSS PAC

100D Pasir Panjang Road #02-11

Meissa

Singapore 118520

Email: hr@acfoss.com.sg

Website : www.acfoss.com.sg

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified

postedCompany.description: Acfoss PAC is an established and expanding Firm that provides a comprehensive range of professional services to a diverse range of clients, both local and international, from large corporations to private businesses, entrepreneurs and individuals across varied industries.  The Firm goals is to look beyond numbers and compliance issues, but to provide our clients with practical advice and solutions to resolve problems and to assist our clients in achieving their business goals.
